description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: ci and deploy. In the ci stage add a ci job that runs `touch .env` then `./scripts/ci/ci.sh` and stores the `coverage/` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a production job that only runs on the master branch, executes `touch .env`, sets `DEPLOY_TARGET=production`, appends Redis, AWS and Stripe secret variables (e.g., `REDISCLOUD_URL=$PRODUCTION_REDIS_URL`) to the .env file, and finally runs `./scripts/ci/deploy.sh`. No specific Docker image, services, caches, or additional artifacts are defined.
